codeReview.summary: The feature improves degraded boot coherence, but diagnostics still fail to provide the stable source-class evidence the feature requires in the seeded residual boot-failure path.

issues.description: When bootstrap fails with residual seeded snapshots, diagnostics always report `source_class: "seeded_bootstrap"` for any seeded snapshot and never distinguish failed degraded boot from ordinary startup. The feature description requires hot endpoints and `/diagnostics/runtime` to agree on one declared degraded-boot policy with stable source-class evidence. After this commit, readiness becomes `degraded`, but the response still exposes the same source class and `stale_live_enabled` flag shape used for non-failed startup, so the diagnostics surface does not actually carry distinct degraded-boot evidence for VAL-CROSS-001/feature expectations.

summary: Fail: `/simple/price` and `/coins/markets` were tightened for degraded boot, but `/diagnostics/runtime` still lacks distinct source-class evidence for residual-seeded bootstrap failure, so the feature does not fully satisfy its declared diagnostics contract.
